achievements.title: Stand Up and Fight!
achievements.description: Complete Plains of Rowahl to begin your long journey ahead
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: The Ghost Town
achievements.description: Complete Blessoon in the hopes of finding a clue that will lead you to your father
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: The Road to Grayl
achievements.description: Complete Burial Grounds by fighting your way through the undead
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: The Shadows in the Sewers
achievements.description: Complete Shayel Passage and make your way to the castle
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: Black Fog Descending
achievements.description: Complete The Castle Grayl and find the king to obtain the Runestone
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: The Great Bridge
achievements.description: Complete Bridge of Sarvan and cross the border to Kendarie
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: The Jewel Mines of Yyprek
achievements.description: Complete The Yyprek Mines and retrieve Kendarie's Runestone
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: The Haunted Fields to Wyht
achievements.description: Complete Bernden Field for an emotional reunion
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: An Audience with the Prince
achievements.description: Complete Castle of Wyht and request an audience with the prince... if you can make it in time
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: The Dedication of Wyht
achievements.description: Complete Grenfoel Church in an attempt to save the prince and Wyth's Runestone
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: Fight to the Death
achievements.description: Complete Coliseum to learn the truth about Helena
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: Through Foul Fumes and Searing Flames
achievements.description: Complete Mt. Jarndunn to reach the Ruh-Arok Temple
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: The Spirit of the Ancient One
achievements.description: Complete Ruh-Arok Temple and get transported to the Forgotten Land to the east
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: Dedication to Gaia
achievements.description: Complete Temple of Amentankh and pass the test of the Great Turtle
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: Lord of the Woods
achievements.description: Complete Hupon-Jen and pass the test of the White Tiger
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: To Parley With Dragons
achievements.description: Complete Terjon Temple and pass the test of the Blue Dragon
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: Home of the Legendary Pinion
achievements.description: Complete Yalwog and pass the test of the Golden Phoenix
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: An End to the Dark Fog
achievements.description: Complete Broch Black and finish the game
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: Not the Bees
achievements.description: Complete Dahl-Nok Valley and rescue the border guards from highly dangerous bees!
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: There's Treasure in the Desert? I Thought You Said Dessert
achievements.description: Complete Gromtull Desert in search for fantastic treasure
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: Do Not Take the Yeti's Herbs
achievements.description: Complete Rohbach by locating the herbs in the snow-covered plains
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: The Village of White Mist
achievements.description: Complete Lumsted by dealing with a different fog
achievements.author: Falcus

achievements.title: Lifeless Waters
achievements.description: Complete Lake Bestriel and cleanse the lake of poison
achievements.author: Falcus
